# Abhishek Patel - AI-Native Full-Stack Engineer

> Mumbai, India. Builds and ships AI products. Two years of experience, multiple live AI SaaS products, and international client delivery. Founding-day engineer at Apex36 Technologies. Open to roles and freelance.

## About
- Role: AI-Native Full-Stack Engineer
- Location: Mumbai, India
- Strengths: Frontend architecture (React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind, Motion), production AI (RAG, voice AI, Gemini, OpenAI), full-stack delivery, DevOps (Docker, GCP Cloud Run), and SEO/GEO.
- Email: patelabhishek1811@gmail.com

## Live products
- BrandGen - brand-aligned AI image generator (solo POC, landing, growth): https://www.getbrandgen.com
- ConvoAI - multi-persona voice AI receptionist (sole core-app developer): https://www.heyyconvo.com
- Mappie.ai - AI that turns ideas into structured specs (core frontend architect): https://www.mappie.ai
- Apex36 website - built from scratch, migrated Vercel to GCP, GEO-optimized: https://www.apex36tech.com

## Client & open-source work
- Sayyar - Oman's first transportation SaaS, sole frontend + backend developer: https://sayyar.om
- StarTech - automated-trading control room dashboard (private client)
- PiSolved platform + PiSolved Chat - redesign, admin dashboard, and a solo RAG chatbot
- DevTinder - full-stack social platform, Node.js internals capstone: https://github.com/AbhishekPatel1811/DevTinder
